title: Ring curler and apparatus for a cosmetic product including the same
abstract: The present invention relates to a ring curler (10) for curling eyelashes (F). The ring curler (10) comprises: a central axis (X); a main body section (100) curved around the central axis (X); a pressing end section (110) for pressing the eyelashes (F), wherein the pressing end section (110) is provided at one end of the main body section (100); and a receiving end section (120) for receiving the eyelashes (F), wherein the receiving end section (120) is provided at the other end of the main body section (100) and faces the pressing end section (110) with a gap (130) extending parallel to the central axis (X). The main body section (100) is elastically deformable so that the pressing end section (110) and the receiving end section (120) can be brought close to each other. The present invention further relates to an apparatus (1) for a cosmetic product. The apparatus (1) comprises: a container assembly (20) for providing the cosmetic product; and a ring curler (10) as described above. The ring curler (10) is detachably coupled to the container assembly (20) so that it surrounds the container assembly (20).
claims:
Claims 1. A ring curler (10) for curling eyelashes (F), comprising: a central axis (X); a main body section (100) curved around the central axis (X); a pressing end section (110) for pressing the eyelashes (F), wherein the pressing end section (110) is provided at one end of the main body section (100); and a receiving end section (120) for receiving the eyelashes (F), wherein the receiving end section (120) is provided at the other end of the main body section (100) and faces the pressing end section (110) with a gap (130) extending parallel to the central axis (X), wherein the main body section (100) is elastically deformable so that the pressing end section (110) and the receiving end section (120) can be brought close to each other. 2. The ring curler (10) according to claim 1, wherein the ring curler (10) is generally C-shaped. 3. The ring curler (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the pressing end section (110) is tapered. 4. The ring curler (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the receiving end section (120) comprises a pad (140) made of a flexible material, and wherein the pad (140) faces the pressing end section (110) with the gap (130). 5. The ring curler (10) according to claim 4, wherein the receiving end section (120) comprises a groove (150) extending parallel to the central axis (X), and wherein the pad (140) is housed in the groove (150) so that a part thereof protrudes from an opening (152) of the groove (150). 6. The ring curler (10) according to claim 5, wherein the receiving end section (120) comprises: an extension wall (160) that continues from the main body 

section (100); and a bent support arm (170) protruding from an outer surface (102) of the main body section (100), and wherein the groove (150) is defined between an outer surface (162) of the extension wall (160) and an inner surface (172) of the bent support arm (170). 7. The ring curler (10) according to claim 5 or 6, wherein the main body section (100) has a cross-sectional shape that allows the pressing end section (110) to abut the center of the pad (140) when the main body section (100) are elastically deformed such that the pressing end section (110) and the receiving end section (120) are close to each other. 8. The ring curler (10) according to any one of claims 5 to 7, wherein the pad (140) has an arch surface (142), and wherein the arch surface (142) protrudes from the opening (152) of the groove (150). 9. An apparatus (1) for a cosmetic product, comprising: a container assembly (20) for providing the cosmetic product; and a ring curler (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the ring curler (10) is detachably coupled to the container assembly (20) so that it surrounds the container assembly (20). 10. The apparatus (1) according to claim 9, wherein the ring curler (10) is detachably coupled to the container assembly (20) by snap fitting. 11. The apparatus (1) according to claim 9 or 10, wherein the container assembly (20) has a cylindrical stick-like shape as a whole. 12. The apparatus (1) according to any one of claims 9 to 11 , wherein the container assembly (20) comprises: a container main body (200) for storing the cosmetic product therein; and a cap (210) that is detachably coupled to the container main body (200), wherein the cap (210) is provided with an applicator (220), and 

 wherein the applicator (220) extends from the cap (210) so that when the cap (210) is coupled to the container main body (200), the applicator (220) is housed in the interior space of the container main body (200). 13. The apparatus (1) according to claim 12, wherein an annular groove (230) into which the ring curler (10) fits is formed on the peripheral surface of the container main body (200) and/or the cap (210). 14. The apparatus (1) according to claim 13, wherein the annular groove (230) is formed across the borderline between the container main body (200) and the cap (210). 15. The apparatus (1) according to claim 13, wherein the annular groove (230) is formed in the container main body (200) or the cap (210) adjacent to the borderline between the container main body (200) and the cap (210).
